news.t: Tuttle Capital Management Launches the Tuttle Capital Meme Stock Income Blast ETF (MEMY)

holdings.infoBox: MEMY is an equity ETF with a total of 84 individual holdings. The top holdings are United States Treasury Bills 0% stock at 75.19%, OTHER ASSETS AND LIABILITIES at 22.74%, PENG US 09/18/26 C50 at 3.53%, TE US 10/16/26 C8 at 3.46%, and INFQ US 10/16/26 C15 at 2.98%.

overview.description: The Tuttle Capital Meme Stock Income Blast ETF (MEMY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that delivers exposure primarily to US-listed meme stocks that gained popularity through social media. The fund also employs an options strategy to generate premiums. MEMY was launched on Jan 20, 2026 and is issued by Tuttle Capital.

data.title: Tuttle Capital Management Launches the Tuttle Capital Meme Stock Income Blast ETF (MEMY)
data.text: Greenwich, Connecticut--(Newsfile Corp. - January 20, 2026) - Tuttle Capital Management, a leading provider of thematic and alternatives ETFs, today announced the launch of the Tuttle Capital Meme Sto...
